caption:
Activate vacation mode with Al Ain Water!

💦 You can win amazing travel prizes in every Al Ain Water Travel Pack. Here’s how:
1. Buy the Al Ain Water Travel Pack.
2. Scan the QR code and enter your details.
3. Spin the wheel and win!

🎁 Prizes are as follows:
- 150 AED off on your next holiday 
- Travel Voucher
- Staycation
- Dream Vacation

What are you waiting for? Get your Al Ain Water Travel Pack at a  supermarket near you.

#Ad #AlAinWater
